stories.headline: Reliance Founders Lift Stake by Most Since 2019 as Stock Slumps
stories.summary: Reliance Industries Ltd. founders, led by billionaire Mukesh Ambani, raised stake in the Indian oil-to-telecom conglomerate by the most in nearly seven years following the stock’s prolonged slump in the wake of the US-Iran war.

stories.headline: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
